next_steps: Run query --live and note id_server and public_key for RustDesk client Settings → Network → ID/Relay server.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/rustdesk-a.json from query --live ct_ip.
Ensure LAN firewall allows TCP 21115-21119 and UDP 21116 to the CT when clients are on other subnets.
Leave Relay server and API server blank for OSS; Key field is the public_key from query --live.
